name: 3' x 8" Unscented Candle Cream - Room Essentials™: Paraffin Wax, 110hr Burn Time, No Container
description:
Illuminate your space with the 3' x 8" Fragrance Free Candle Cream from Room Essentials™. This unscented candle is great for setting a minimal, bright ambiance. Crafted from paraffin wax, it's designed to go on for longer with an approximate burn time of 110 hours. With a single wick, this pillar candle is ideal for setting the table for dinner parties or enjoying a quiet night in.

Room Essentials™: Everyday value.
